description_long: This is a mid-rise office building with a rectangular footprint and a flat, light-colored roof. The exterior is clad in reddish-brown brickwork, giving it a classic urban appearance. The facade features a regular grid of identical, rectangular windows with dark frames, arranged symmetrically across four floors. The ground floor includes a prominent entrance, distinguished by a slightly larger window or door area. There is no visible signage or decorative architectural detailing, emphasizing a utilitarian and functional design. The building's overall style is simple and practical, suitable for commercial or administrative use in a city environment.
description: A four-story brick office building with a flat roof and regularly spaced rectangular windows, featuring a simple, utilitarian urban design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance at the bottom center and four rows of symmetrically arranged windows.
description_view_1: Side view with four rows of evenly spaced windows, no visible entrance, and consistent brick facade.
description_view_2: Rear view with a uniform grid of windows and no entrance or distinguishing features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the window arrangement of view 1, with a plain brick surface.
attribute_window_pattern: Symmetrical grid of rectangular windows, evenly spaced in horizontal and vertical rows across all facades.
